subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast been named with My Name in the Kingdom of Names! Hearken unto what the Spirit imparteth unto thee from the heaven of might [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اسم الذی سمیت باسمی فی ملکوت الاسماء اسمع ما یلقیک الروح من سماء عز
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
